description_long: This is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a large, dark display screen. The keyboard features a standard layout with a mix of rectangular and square keys, and a spacious touchpad is positioned below the keyboard. The laptop's exterior is primarily a matte gray color, with a subtle logo centered on the back of the display. The device appears to be constructed from metal or high-quality plastic, giving it a sturdy and professional appearance. No visible ports or stickers are present on the sides or palm rest. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functionality.
description: A sleek, gray laptop with a large dark screen, standard keyboard, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen, full keyboard, and large touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and edge of the keyboard and screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain gray back of the screen with a centered logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim edge and side of the keyboard and screen.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized 'T' with two dots above it, centered on the back of the display; no recognizable commercial brand.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a function row and no visible numeric keypad; keys are rectangular and evenly spaced.
